pattern_detection_summary.trigger: MentionInput component renders successfully in PostCreator but fails to show dropdown in CommentForm

failure_pattern.behavior: MentionInput renders but no dropdown appears
failure_pattern.hierarchy: CommentForm > form > div.space-y-3 > div.space-y-3 > div.relative > MentionInput

contributing_factors: Toolbar z-index: 10 creating stacking context conflicts
Form element creating additional containment boundaries
Complex component hierarchy suppressing dropdown visibility

evidence.toolbar_z_index: CommentForm line 172: z-10 class on formatting toolbar
evidence.form_containment: form element creating CSS containment context
evidence.dropdown_z_index: MentionInput dropdown uses z-[99999] but may be contained

characteristics: Identical MentionInput component behaves differently in comment vs post contexts
Dropdown renders successfully in simple hierarchy but fails in complex form hierarchy
Z-index escalation (99999) fails to overcome containment boundaries
CSS containment created by intermediate form/toolbar elements
false_fix_indicators: Increasing z-index values without addressing containment
Moving dropdown to document.body without context preservation

key_differences.toolbar_interference: CommentForm has z-10 toolbar above input area
key_differences.containment_boundaries: Form creates additional CSS containment boundaries

immediate_fix.implementation: Remove intermediate div wrappers, move toolbar outside input area
immediate_fix.z_index_management: Ensure clean stacking context for dropdown

long_term_prevention: Establish component hierarchy depth limits (max 3 levels)
Create dropdown portal system for complex contexts
Implement CSS containment testing in component integration tests
Add visual regression tests for dropdown rendering in various contexts
testing_requirements: Visual tests comparing dropdown rendering across components

symptoms: Same component fails in complex form hierarchy
No error messages or exceptions thrown

solution_patterns: Move interfering elements outside dropdown context
Implement dropdown portals for complex contexts
